products.name: Marin Kitagawa – My Dress-Up Darling
products.description: Marin poses playfully in her school uniform, highlighting her bright personality and fashionable charm.

products.name: Rei Ayanami – Evangelion
products.description: TRei sits quietly in her iconic plugsuit, beautifully sculpted to reflect her mysterious and emotionless aura.

products.name: Light Yagami & Ryuk – Death Note
products.description: A dark and dramatic statue featuring Light with the red apple and Ryuk looming behind him, capturing the intense supernatural atmosphere of Death Note.

products.name: Frieren – Frieren: Beyond Journey’s End
products.description: Elegant mage Frieren stands gracefully with her staff on a floral base, showcasing her calm yet powerful presence.

products.name: Denji - Chainsaw Man
products.description: An action-packed figure of Denji in Chainsaw Man form, featuring dynamic blood effects and an intense battle pose.

products.name: Family Trivia Quest
products.description: Fun trivia board game for the whole family with 500+ questions across 6 categories.

products.name: Castle Builder
products.description: Strategic castle building game. Be the first to complete your fortress!

products.name: Jungle Adventure
products.description: Cooperative board game where players explore the jungle together.

products.name: Number Race
products.description: Educational math board game for kids ages 5-10. Makes learning fun!

products.name: Word Wizards
products.description: Spelling and vocabulary board game. Great for building language skills.

products.name: Classic Teddy Bear
products.description: Super soft and huggable teddy bear made from premium plush material.

products.name: Bunny Plush
products.description: Adorable fluffy bunny with long floppy ears. Perfect bedtime companion.

products.name: Elephant Buddy
products.description: Gentle elephant stuffed animal with embroidered details and soft trunk.

products.name: Lion King Plush
products.description: Majestic lion stuffed toy with fluffy mane. Roar-some cuddle buddy!

products.name: Panda Bear
products.description: Classic black and white panda plush with cute embroidered features.
